case_title: KELLNER, WILLIAM vs. APPENRODT, JAMES F. et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF KELLNER, WILLIAM UNSERVED ON DEFENDANT APPENRODT, JAMES F.
JUDGMENT DEBTOR FAILED TO APPEAR FOR ORDER OF EXAMINATION; JUDGMENT CREDITOR INSTRUCTED TO FILE AN OSC.

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 302, MOTION FOR ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE, CALENDAR OF APR-14-1999, GRANTED PURSUANT TO WRITTEN ORDER COURT FINDS DEFENDANT WILFULLY FAILED TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION AT THIS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE AFTER HAVING BEEN PERSONALLY SERVED. BODY ATTACHMENT IS ISSUED IN THE AMOUNT OF $10,000.00 BOND.
WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT ISSUED, BAIL SET AT $10,000.00, AS TO DEFENDANT APPENRODT, JAMES F.
ORDER --PER COMM. BEST--TO RECALL WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT ISSUED ON 08/FEB/01 FOR THE ARREST OF JAMES F. APPENDRODT, PER REQUEST OF CREDITOR--CASE HAS SETTLED.
CERTIFIED COPY OF ORDER WAS WALKED TO THE SHERIFF'S DEPT.
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF KELLNER, WILLIAM AS TO DEFENDANT APPENRODT, JAMES F.
